basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for MTS, DEO and Personal Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India (ICSIL) has published the MTS, DEO, and Personal Assistant Notification 2026 on 15 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 positions across Multi Tasking Staff (MTS), Data Entry Operator (DEO), and Personal Assistant (PA) posts. Candidates holding 10th Pass (for MTS) or 10+2/Graduation (for DEO and PA) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at the official venue. The walk-in interview dates are 21 May 2026 for MTS and 22 May 2026 for DEO and PA. Candidates can easily access the notification PDF and venue details via the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Multi Tasking Staff (MTS): 10th Pass Personal Assistant (PA): 1. 10+2/Graduation in any discipline 2. 80 words per minute in shorthand 3. 30 words per minute in typing 4. Working knowledge of Computers (Microsoft Office) Desirable: Work experience in Central / State Government Offices Data Entry Operator (DEO): 1. 10+2/Graduation in any discipline 2. 8000 key depression per hour (Typing speed Approx. 27 W.P.M)

salary_details.details: Multi Tasking Staff (MTS): Rs. 18,456/- (Minimum wages as per rates of GNCT of Delhi) Personal Assistant (PA): Rs.22,411/- Matriculates but not Graduates Or Rs. 24,356/- In the Category of Graduates and Above (Minimum wages as per rates of GNCT of Delhi) Data Entry Operator (DEO): Rs.22,411/- Matriculates but not Graduates Or Rs. 24,356/- In the Category of Graduates and Above (Minimum wages as per rates of GNCT of Delhi)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICSIL?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for the 21st and 22nd of May 2026, depending on the post. Candidates should ensure they attend on the correct date for their desired position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICSIL?
faq.answer: ICSIL has announced a total of 3 vacancies for various posts, including Multi Tasking Staff (MTS), Personal Assistant (PA), and Data Entry Operator (DEO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for ICSIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories (General/OBC, SC/ST, Women) is Rs. 590/-. This is a one-time registration fee and is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the MTS post?
faq.answer: For the Multi Tasking Staff (MTS) position, the minimum educational qualification required is passing the 10th standard.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Personal Assistant (PA) and Data Entry Operator (DEO) posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Personal Assistant (PA) and Data Entry Operator (DEO) posts ranges from Rs. 22,411/- for matriculates but not graduates, up to Rs. 24,356/- for graduates and above, as per GNCT of Delhi minimum wages.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at the ICSIL office. The specific address is Delhi, Pincode: 110054.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation provided by ICSIL?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for further information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a scrutiny of documents followed by a walk-in interview or interaction with the selection panel.

faq.question: Q10. How can I find the official notification for ICSIL recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading. You can also visit the official website of ICSIL.
